frontmatter.title: F1Predict - Formula 1 Race Prediction
frontmatter.summary: Built a system for predicting Formula 1 race outcomes, including data collection, feature engineering, model training, and deployment. Achieved 1-second prediction error.

frontmatter.title: Trading Bot
frontmatter.summary: C++ trading bot for automated cryptocurrency and stock market transactions.

frontmatter.title: MARS: Multi Agent Recommendation System
frontmatter.summary: Developed a FastAPI‐based system that automates research paper collection from ArXiv using LLM agents to review and filter relevant papers.
